channel_alignment_why_2_lines: The rewrite aligns well with the veterinary and reassuring tone expected by La Compagnie des Animaux.
It focuses on practical usage, clear safety instructions, and avoids overclaiming or unsupported claims.
general_remarks: Avoid any unsubstantiated or absolute claims to maintain compliance.
Keep emphasizing practical usage instructions for pet owners.
Maintain clarity and scan-friendly formatting for easy reading.
Use supportive and measured language rather than definitive cures.
Ensure all mandatory safety and regulatory notices are clearly included.
Balance scientific support with approachable tone to build trust.

per_field_remarks.Titre produit: Clear, concise product title with useful volume info added.
per_field_remarks.Titre court du produit (60 caractères ma: Short title is concise and highlights anti-stress purpose.
per_field_remarks.Slug: Slug updated to include anti-stress and chat for SEO.
per_field_remarks.META Title: More descriptive and keyword-rich to improve SEO.
per_field_remarks.META Description: Enhanced to include supportive and reassuring language.
per_field_remarks.Description courte (...) 175 caractères: Correctly preserved from original with useful info.
per_field_remarks.Description du produit unique/site 400 c: More concise, clear and focused on key benefits and usage.
per_field_remarks.Description courte 600 caractères: Expanded with practical info like room size and duration.
per_field_remarks.Description longue: Comprehensive, clinically grounded, includes safety info.
per_field_remarks.Conseils d'utilisation uniques (SEO): Usage instructions well maintained and clear.
per_field_remarks.Mots clés: Keywords updated to better target user queries naturally.
per_field_remarks.Argu 1: Claims well aligned with brief without absolute promises.
per_field_remarks.Argu 2: Claim of scientific proof stated carefully without 'clinically proven'.
per_field_remarks.Argu 3: User approval rate maintained with neutral phrasing.
per_field_remarks.Argu 4: Origin/manufacturing info properly included and factual.
per_field_remarks.Argu 5: Ease of use clearly communicated for practical guidance.
